content: Hello! How can I help you today?

Ukor Mvendaga is a health informatician and software developer based in Abuja, Nigeria. He has over 12 years of experience in health data management and software development. Ukor has held various roles including Health Informatics Clerk at APIN, Head of Software Development at Sysmax Technologies, Program Officer at Inter-Gender Development Center, and Senior Associate in Health Informatics at CIHP. He specializes in creating applications for high-traffic enterprises, database management, web and mobile app development, and health data systems. Ukor is currently pursuing a Master of Science in Computer Science from Joseph Sarwuan Tarka University, Makurdi.

Ukor Mvendaga is currently a Senior Associate in Health Informatics at CIHP. His responsibilities include leading system design, optimizing data repositories, developing mobile applications such as the CIHP Coolgirls app, supporting program staff in data utilization, supervising data uploads to national systems, coordinating training on data management tools, and ensuring the deployment and smooth operation of electronic information systems.
